# Code Chaos

> Code Chaos is a Hitech Psytrance, Psycore and Darkpsy DJ and music producer from Germany, active since 2016 with 24+ releases. Code Chaos also runs **Code Chaos Audio**, an audio plugin series whose first release is **Crucible**, a 3-band harmonic saturation plugin. The project offers worldwide DJ booking and a professional audio mastering service.

Primary site language: German (de). Domain: https://codechaos-official.de/

## Key facts

- **Artist:** Code Chaos — Hitech Psytrance, Psycore, Darkpsy producer & DJ from Germany.
- **Active since:** 2016. **Releases:** 24+ on labels incl. Abstract Sound Design (DE, co-founded by Code Chaos), TATEWARI Records (Mexico), Soma Ritual Records (India).
- **Tempo range:** 180–300 BPM. Genres: Hitech Psytrance (170–230 BPM), Psycore (180–300 BPM), Darkpsy / Dark Psytrance (150–200 BPM).
- **Booking:** Worldwide. DJ Set from €150/hour, Live Set from €300/hour. Contact: booking@codechaos-official.de
- **Mastering (Polished Media):** Stereo Mastering from €79, Stem Mastering from €129, Full Release package from €999. Contact: polished.media@gmx.de

## Code Chaos Audio — Plugins

- **Crucible** — a 3-band harmonic saturation plugin for Windows and macOS (VST3 / AU).
  - Splits the signal into Low, Mid and High bands, each saturated independently.
  - Saturation types include Hard Clip, Tube and Tape (and more), selectable per band.
  - Per-band Drive, Mix and Gain; adjustable crossovers; per-band Mute/Solo; oversampling up to 4x.
  - Built for Psytrance, Hitech, Psycore and Darkpsy producers, but works on any source (mixing & mastering).
  - Tagline: "Shape. Saturate. Dominate." / "From subtle warmth to full-on destruction."
  - Buy / download: https://timberwolf688.gumroad.com/l/crucible
  - Product page: https://codechaos-official.de/crucible.html

## Definitions (genre guide)

- **Psycore:** A Psytrance subgenre at 180–300+ BPM combining dark psychedelic soundscapes with hardcore energy; dense atmospheric pads, experimental sound design, minimal sine-wave percussion.
- **Hitech / Hi-Tech Psytrance:** Fast (≈170–230 BPM), complex, glitchy, hyper-detailed psychedelic trance.
- **Darkpsy / Dark Psytrance:** Slower (≈150–200 BPM) but atmospherically intense, occult and dark soundscapes.
